title: Cobblemon Controller Support
description: Adds controller navigation for some Cobblemon UI's, easier initiation of battles with keyboard/controller, and fixes controller flight.
body: ### [Please consider supporting me on ko-fi if you like the mod and can afford it, I appreciate even 1 dollar. ](https://ko-fi.com/raguto) --- _**I grant permission to anyone seeking to add my mod to a modpack**_ --- ### 🎮 Cobblemon Controller Support A controller support mod designed specifically for Cobblemon UI's and flight controls This mod aims to make playing Cobblemon feel more seamless, integrating automatic targeting of nearby pokemon with a keyboard/controller keybind that initiates a battle with the targeted pokemon, as well as fixing flight controls, and enables controller input for the interaction wheel. Players using only keyboard and mouse can still make use of the auto-target system for easy initiation of battles. ✨ Features - Auto-target system for making initiating battles easier - Controller-friendly interaction with Cobblemon’s custom GUIs - Works alongside keyboard & mouse (no forced overrides) - Configuration in mod menu to adjust the mod to your liking This mod is intended to work alongside MidnightControls/Controlify, not to replace them! Use both, and use [Battle Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-battle-extras) for controller battle controls.
